description_long: This shrub is a dense, rectangular mass of green foliage, with a thick covering of overlapping, simple leaves that create a lush, bushy appearance. The surface is uneven and naturalistic, with some leaves protruding more than others, giving it a realistic, organic texture. Two small, pale yellow star-shaped elements, possibly flowers or decorative features, are visible on the upper surface, adding a subtle contrast to the dominant green. The shrub's sides are draped with cascading leaves, creating a soft, voluminous silhouette. The overall form is compact and well-maintained, suggesting it could be used as a decorative hedge or border in an urban landscape. The foliage appears dense enough to obscure any view through the shrub, emphasizing its role as a visual barrier or accent.
description: A dense, rectangular shrub with lush green foliage and two small yellow star-shaped features on top, featuring cascading leaves and a compact, well-maintained form.
description_view_0: The top and front of the shrub are visible, showing dense green leaves and two yellow star-shaped features on the upper surface.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thick, cascading foliage and the overall rounded rectangular shape, with less visibility of the yellow features.
description_view_2: The back and top of the shrub are shown, with dense green leaves and the yellow star-shaped features still faintly visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the dense, draping leaves and the shrub's compact, rectangular form.
